scripts.dev: vp run --filter @ozby-dev/client build && vp run --filter @ozby-dev/workers dev
scripts.build: vp run --filter @ozby-dev/client build && vp run --filter @ozby-dev/workers build
scripts.typecheck: vp run --filter @ozby-dev/client check-types && vp run --filter @ozby-dev/workers check-types && vp run --filter @ozby-dev/infra check-types && wp typecheck
scripts.test: vp run --filter @ozby-dev/client test && vp run --filter @ozby-dev/workers test && vp run --filter @ozby-dev/infra test && vp exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts test/ci-governance-contract.test.ts test/secrets-config-contract.test.ts
scripts.qa: wp lint && wp typecheck && vp run test
scripts.verify:secrets: wp audit no-dev-vars && wp audit secret-provider-quarantine && wp audit secrets-config && wp secrets doctor --profile preview --json
